title: Senior Software Engineer - Capgemini India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capgemini India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capgemini India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Capgemini India:
Capgemini India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India!
